Facebook Reporting: Supermetrics and
Google Data Studio With Karen Sahetya
Nuggets of Wisdom from the Coaches
You probably heard of saying "You can't improve what you can't track and/or report
on"
We live in a world of data.
Specifically, in the world of Facebook data.
How to collect Facebook data, interpret it and most importantly how to use it the right
way so you can report on it.
That is why we have asked our expert coach Karen Sahetya to join us as the guest
coach and provide training on how to use Supermetrics and Google Data Studio tools
to help you with this obstacle.
For those who do not know, Karen is our expert coach and she is part of the agency
that specializes in driving leads through Facebook Ads, funnels, and messenger bots
for local businesses and coaches.
As a data-driven, results-focused team, they work on behalf of clients to create their
lead generation systems and scale them with consistent and profitable outcomes.
They excel at the strategy behind these components of lead generation and have the
ability to tie these methods of acquiring clients together with automation that saves
businesses time and drives more revenue for them.
